summary: Grouped Ticket View Feature Testing - ALL FEATURES WORKING. Tested: Admin Support page at /admin?section=support, grouped view for users with 2+ tickets, single ticket users display normally, expand/collapse functionality, ticket detail view, respond functionality, and user regression test.
features_tested: 1. Admin Support Tickets page loads at /admin?section=support - PASSED
2. Grouped view shows clients with 2+ tickets collapsed with count badge - PASSED (Found multiple: '3 tickets', '13 tickets', '2 tickets', '4 tickets', etc.)
3. Single ticket users show normally without grouping - PASSED (Informazioni, Obbad hamid, simona bitonti all show directly)
4. Clicking a grouped user expands to show all their tickets - PASSED (Riccardo Crotti expanded to show 3 tickets: Sbloccata account, Blocco account, Info su bonifico sepa)
5. Clicking a ticket within expanded group opens the detail view - PASSED
6. Can respond to tickets normally - PASSED (Message textarea, Attach button, Send Message button all functional)
7. Regression: Test user can still login and view their tickets - PASSED (ashleyalt005@gmail.com can login, view support tickets, has 1 ticket 'qwe' visible)
critical_code_review_comments: Support.js getGroupedTickets() function correctly groups tickets by user_id and sorts by most recent activity
toggleUserExpanded() function properly manages expand/collapse state using Set
Grouped users show count badge (e.g., '3 tickets') and expand arrow icon
Single ticket users render normally without grouping UI elements
Admin ticket detail view includes all necessary features: status change buttons, message textarea, attach functionality, Send Message button
context_for_next_testing_agent: Grouped ticket view feature fully tested and working. Admin panel at /admin?section=support shows 45 clients with 91 tickets. Users with 2+ tickets (like Riccardo Crotti with 3, Alberto Pugliesi with 13) show as collapsible groups. Single ticket users show normally. All expand/collapse, ticket detail, and respond features work correctly. User regression test passed - ashleyalt005@gmail.com can login and view their support tickets.

grouped_view_verification.expand_collapse: Working - Arrow rotates on expand, tickets appear indented with border-left indicator
grouped_view_verification.ticket_detail_view: Working - Shows subject, creation date, Customer ID, message history, response textarea, attach and send buttons
grouped_view_verification.status_change_buttons: All present - Mark In Progress, Mark Resolved, Close Ticket, Delete Ticket
